notes: B001: Mrs Dupont sounds cheerful, we had a nice chat about her garden.
backstory: Former schoolteacher. Lives alone since husband passed in 2021. Loves classical music.

notes: B002: Seems tired and confused, asked for water multiple times.
backstory: Retired postal worker. Has a cat named Minou. Daughter calls once a month from Lyon.
daily_routine: Has coffee and bread for breakfast

notes: B003: No answer. Called 3 times, knocked on door, nothing.

backstory: Former nurse. Knows everyone in the building. Hasn't been outside since March.
